footer.newsletterDesc: Receive insights, case studies and news directly in your inbox.
footer.brandDesc: Providing creative ideas for your business.

hero.subtitle: SUNNIT designs and develops tailor-made digital solutions, integrating custom software, cloud, data and artificial intelligence.

slides.text: We design tailor-made digital platforms, portals and enterprise applications ready to grow with processes, teams and customers.
We design scalable architectures, controlled migrations, backup and business continuity with cost-oriented delivery.
We turn documents, policies and knowledge bases into operational answers, intelligent comparisons and insights accessible in natural language.
We build databases, ETL, dashboards and reporting systems to make data readable, reliable and useful for decision-making.
We automate builds, tests, deployments and infrastructure for faster releases, repeatable environments and continuous control.

hero.visualMainDesc: Discover how we can transform your company's technological potential.

highlights.title: Next-gen solutions with creative and innovative ideas
highlights.desc: Strategy, UX, code, cloud and automation in a scalable system.
highlights.kpi1Text: Users served by enterprise platforms and portals.
highlights.aiDesc: Documents, contracts, policies and knowledge bases searchable in natural language.

howWeWork.desc: From discovery to release, we build clear, high-performance systems ready to evolve: from custom software to DevOps pipelines, from data to document intelligence.

services.title: Custom software development
services.desc: Our custom software development services address a fundamental need, offering a solution to a wide range of complex business problems. We are a custom software development company based in Rome, with an emphasis on collaboration with the client, communication and a passion for creating high-quality custom software applications.
services.cloudDesc: We offer Azure, Google and AWS consulting services, including cloud migrations, disaster recovery, cloud backup and Microsoft Virtual Desktop. Our team goes far beyond simple migration, boasting experience in developing cloud-native applications and redesigning legacy software for cloud enablement. We optimize your Azure, Google and AWS cloud to maximize cost efficiency, security and best-practice adoption.
services.aiDesc: SunnitAI is an innovative initiative by Sunnit, designed to revolutionize enterprise knowledge management. This artificial intelligence-based solution integrates seamlessly with existing knowledge management systems (KMS and document management systems) or installs a complete one if your organization does not yet have one.

serviceShowcase.title: Sunnit Srvices
serviceShowcase.desc: Sunnit has developed significant expertise across various technological sectors, creating solutions that deliver tangible value to organizations.

cards.title: Custom Software
cards.text: Tailor-made applications to digitize processes, integrate systems and accelerate business.

cards.title: Website Development
cards.text: High-performance, accessible websites, portals and web platforms that are easy to evolve.

cards.title: Database & Analytics
cards.text: Databases, data warehouses, ETL and dashboards to turn data into decisions.

cards.title: Cloud Consulting
cards.text: Assessments, migrations and scalable, resilient and optimized cloud architectures.

cards.title: DevOps Services
cards.text: Pipelines, automation and repeatable environments for fast and controlled releases.

cards.title: AI & Document Intelligence
cards.text: AI solutions to query documents, knowledge bases and company content.

cards.title: Extension of your team
cards.text: We enter the client's workflows with a shared roadmap, short sprints and clear communication.

cards.title: Full-stack expertise
cards.text: Frontend, backend, cloud, database, DevOps and AI in a single delivery path.

cards.title: Agile approach
cards.text: Prototypes, progressive releases and continuous improvement to reduce risks and timelines.

cards.title: Long-term partnerships
cards.text: Maintenance, evolution and support to accompany the product over time.

stats.author: Edward Teller
stats.growthDesc: Since 2020, we have served companies and organizations with tailor-made digital solutions: software, cloud, data and AI.

cta.title: We are here to help with your questions.

intro.eyebrow: Software engineering, cloud and international delivery
intro.title: We build solid, scalable digital platforms ready to grow.
intro.desc: Sunnit Srl supports companies and organizations in developing custom software solutions, complex websites, high-performance databases and reliable cloud infrastructures, with a pragmatic, results-oriented approach.

expertiseBand.title: Sunnit uses the best technologies
expertiseBand.text: Specialized in Microsoft, AWS and Google technologies, with a talented team made up of full-stack developers, SQL Server database administrators, UI/UX designers, software architects, network engineering consultants and project managers.

visualWide.title: Broad technical experience, clean execution
visualWide.desc: From application strategy to cloud delivery, we maintain a broad vision without losing control over technical details.

story.title: The story of SUNNIT
story.descLeft: A key moment in the growth journey.

story.title: A talented team
story.desc: Founded by Dante Marotta as a spin-off of the British company Sunnit, for over 5 years it has dealt with custom software development, creation of complex websites, SQL database optimization and customer migration to the cloud. Our broad technical expertise and lean approach to project management make us the ideal partner for your next software project. Let's make sure everything is done right from the start. Contact us today!

whyUs.title: Less complexity, more control over the project.
whyUs.desc: Clear technical decisions, lightweight processes and shared responsibility to reach production without waste.

quote.text: When technology, design and infrastructure work together, every project starts better and scales with less friction.
quote.author: SUNNIT Method

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.text: Tell us about your project: together we will understand how to turn it into a scalable digital solution.

intro.title: We are here to answer your questions.
intro.desc: We will reply within 1-2 business days with an initial assessment.

hero.title: What we do
hero.text: We build software, platforms and infrastructures with a technical, operational and continuous approach.

intro.title: Technology built around real processes.
text: Sunnit works across five areas: custom software development, websites, database and analytics, cloud consulting and DevOps.
We do not offer rigid packages: we design stacks, integrations and roadmaps based on the operational context, internal team and business goals.

lead.title: A technical partner for systems that need to last.
text: From initial development to ongoing support, we work on digital products, data environments and infrastructures.
We focus on code quality, maintenance, security and scalability.

stats.label: Integrated expertise in the same team

categories.title: Custom software development
categories.summary: Applications, platforms and integrations built around the company's real processes and constraints.
description: Our custom software development services address a fundamental need, offering a solution to a wide range of complex business problems.
We are a custom software development company based in Rome, with an emphasis on collaboration with the client, communication and a passion for creating high-quality custom software applications.
detail: Thanks to our software engineering and continuous development teams, you will have a reliable partner for long-term software development.
Discover the custom software development services we offer below or explore our approach to creating tailor-made software solutions.

categories.title: Website development
categories.summary: Web experience, content and performance in a single platform designed for customers and internal teams.
description: Sunnit is a leading web development company that combines expertise in complex website development with quality design optimized for mobile devices.
We build elegant, easy-to-use websites for your customers, able to support your business and its mission as well.
Our web developers have extensive experience across all web design and development services.
detail: We support brands, marketing and operations in building sites that are not just beautiful to look at.
We also design them to be easy to manage, secure and performant over time.

categories.title: Database and analytics
categories.summary: Reliable data, solid SQL architectures and operational reporting for faster decisions.
description: Sunnit offers a complete range of SQL Server consulting services, including ETL development, data warehousing, business intelligence and report development.
We also handle cloud database migration, SQL Server environment assessments, periodic health checks, security audits, database backup and maintenance.
detail: Our team of SQL experts is available on a project basis.
We can also step in as remote DBAs available through our Managed SQL Server Services or SQL Server Support packages.
bullets: Remote support for database administrators and SQL Server
Migration and consulting for Azure SQL Cloud

categories.title: Cloud Consulting
categories.summary: Migration, modernization and operational optimization on Azure, Google Cloud and AWS.
description: We offer Azure, Google and AWS consulting services, including cloud migrations, disaster recovery, cloud backup and Microsoft Virtual Desktop.
Unlike most Azure, Google and AWS consulting firms, our team goes far beyond simple migration.
We boast experience in developing cloud-native applications and redesigning legacy software for cloud enablement.
detail: We optimize your Azure, Google and AWS cloud to maximize cost efficiency.
We also work on security and best-practice adoption.

categories.title: DevOps Services
categories.summary: Pipelines, automation and provisioning to make development repeatable and secure.
description: Our DevOps services bridge the gap between two of our biggest areas of expertise: software development and cloud infrastructure.
We offer automated testing and deployment of custom software improvements and cloud infrastructure provisioning through scripts.
detail: We work on release flows and environments to reduce manual errors.
We accelerate delivery and maintain control over infrastructure assets.

closing.title: Every category translates into concrete delivery.
text: We can work on a single technical block.
Or guide the entire chain: product, backend, data, cloud and production release.
points: Initial analysis of the existing architecture
Definition of priorities, risks and milestones
Incremental development with ongoing operational support

hero.title: SunnitAI
hero.headline: Turn documents and company knowledge into operational answers.
hero.desc: An AI solution to analyze documents, query knowledge bases, compare information and support fast decisions.

items.title: Analyzes complex documents
items.text: Extracts relevant concepts, data, relationships and content.

items.title: Queries knowledge
items.text: Enables natural-language questions on company sources.

items.title: Compares information
items.text: Highlights differences, similarities and inconsistencies between documents.

faq.title: Document intelligence with an interactive accordion.
faq.desc: Each feature can include a description, practical example and business benefit.

items.title: Intelligent Document Analysis
items.text: Analyzes contracts, reports, manuals and policies, extracting relevant content and relationships.

items.title: Natural Language Querying
items.text: Allows natural-language questions on documents and internal information sources.

items.title: Advanced Document Comparison
items.text: Compares versions, specifications and policies to highlight differences and inconsistencies.

items.title: Secure Access Control
items.text: Respects permissions and roles to make knowledge accessible only to those who need to use it.

items.title: Legal
items.text: Contract analysis, version comparison and regulatory search.

items.title: Operations
items.text: Internal knowledge base and support for complex processes.

items.title: HR
items.text: Policies, manuals and company documents that can be queried.

items.title: Procurement
items.text: Specifications, tenders, offers and document due diligence.

items.title: IT
items.text: Technical documentation, runbooks and assisted troubleshooting.

items.title: Customer care
items.text: Consistent answers based on validated and updated sources.

list.suffix: This is an absolutely essential practice for any digital project that wants measurable impact.
